widget.name: React Data Grid
widget.description: Data grid powered by react-data-grid with Mendix Datasource

property.caption: Data source
property.description: Mendix object list to display in the grid

property.caption: Columns
property.description: Define one column per attribute

property.caption: Show
property.description: How to display data in this column

property.caption: Attribute
property.description: The attribute to show in this column

property.caption: Header
property.description: Column header text

property.caption: Width (px)
property.description: Column width in pixels

property.caption: Dynamic text
property.description: Text template evaluated per row (active when Show = Dynamic text)

property.caption: Custom content
property.description: Widgets rendered per row, e.g. buttons or images (active when Show = Custom content)

property.caption: Sortable
property.description: Allow sorting on this column

property.caption: Resizable
property.description: Allow the user to resize this column

property.caption: Freeze column
property.description: Pin this column to the left side

property.caption: Group by
property.description: Group rows by the values in this column. Multiple columns can be checked to create nested groups (order = column position).

property.caption: Cell class
property.description: Expression that returns a CSS class name per row, e.g. if $currentObject/Priority = 'Critical' then 'rdg-cell--danger' else ''. Built-in: rdg-cell--danger, rdg-cell--warning, rdg-cell--success, rdg-cell--info, rdg-cell--muted.

property.caption: Display style
property.description: Value = plain text. Progress bar = horizontal bar for numeric values in the 0–100 range.

property.caption: Alignment
property.description: Horizontal alignment (auto = right for numbers, center for boolean, left otherwise)

property.caption: Decimal places
property.description: Fixed decimal places for numeric values (-1 = use Mendix default format)

property.caption: Currency symbol
property.description: Prefix symbol, e.g. €, $, £ (only applied when Decimal places ≥ 0)

property.caption: Date format
property.description: Mendix pattern, e.g. dd-MM-yyyy | dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm | EEEE d MMMM yyyy | MMM dd, yyyy (empty = use Mendix default format)

property.caption: Aggregate
property.description: Show a summary value in the summary row: Sum or Average require a numeric attribute column; Count works for any column.

property.caption: Enable row selection
property.description: Show checkboxes so users can select one or more rows

property.caption: On row selected
property.description: Fires in the context of a row when it is added to the selection

property.caption: On row deselected
property.description: Fires in the context of a row when it is removed from the selection

property.caption: Enable CSV export
property.description: Show an Export CSV button above the grid

property.caption: Enable Excel export
property.description: Show an Export Excel button above the grid (downloads a .xlsx file)

property.caption: Enable PDF export
property.description: Show an Export PDF button above the grid (downloads a .pdf file)

property.caption: Export filename
property.description: Filename for the downloaded file (without extension)

property.caption: Toolbar widgets
property.description: Additional widgets shown in the toolbar next to the Export CSV button (e.g. Import button)

property.caption: On row click
property.description: Action to execute when the user clicks a row

property.caption: Empty placeholder
property.description: Text shown when the data source returns no rows

property.caption: Enable master / detail
property.description: Show an expand toggle on each row. The detail content is configured as a drop zone directly on the page canvas (below the widget).

property.caption: Detail content
property.description: Widget(s) rendered in the collapsible detail panel below each master row (e.g. a nested Data Grid scoped to a child datasource via association)

property.caption: Detail panel height (px)
property.description: Height of the expanded detail panel in pixels

property.caption: Configuration attribute
property.description: Unlimited String attribute to persist filter, sort and column order settings. Surround the widget with a Data view to select an attribute.

property.caption: On configuration change
property.description: Action executed after the configuration attribute is updated (e.g. to commit the object)

property.caption: Enable header filters
property.description: Show a filter input in each column header to filter rows client-side

property.caption: Summary position
property.description: Show a row with aggregate values (sum, count, average) above or below the data. Configure Aggregate per column in the Columns settings.

property.caption: Enable group by
property.description: Show a Group by button in the toolbar. Columns with Group by enabled can then be toggled on/off as grouping levels.

property.caption: Enable column chooser
property.description: Show a Columns button in the toolbar that lets users show or hide individual columns

property.caption: Enable column reordering
property.description: Allow users to drag column headers to reorder columns

property.caption: Row height (px)
property.description: Height of each data row in pixels

property.caption: Grid height (px)
property.description: Total height of the grid in pixels
